summary: KOSPI maintains momentum following the March 24th rebound to 5,554 points. Retail investors continue to act as the primary defense, having accumulated over 26 trillion won this month to offset foreign selling. Markets remain cautious but stabilized as Middle East geopolitical tensions ease, reducing oil price volatility.
market_drivers: Market Sentiment: Continued stabilization following the 2.74% rebound on March 24th.
Retail Support: Retail investors have net-purchased over 26 trillion won, providing a floor against foreign profit-taking.
Geopolitical Climate: De-escalation signals in the Middle East have cooled energy price fears, aiding broad index recovery.
Corporate Highlight: SK Hynix focus remains on potential U.S. listing and memory chip expansion, signaling long-term growth interest.
